expectations.text: All 3 output files exist: offer.md, offer.json, conversion-copy.md
expectations.evidence: ls confirmed all 3 files in outputs/: offer.md (20745 bytes), offer.json (11869 bytes), conversion-copy.md (9733 bytes).

expectations.text: offer.md shows evidence skill ran Mode C interview — has surfaced specific pain/gain not in original prompt (vd portfolio building, FAANG interview, agency feedback gap, salary plateau)
expectations.evidence: offer.md Section 0 'Mode C Interview — Pain/Gain Surfaced Từ Interview 5 Round' explicitly walks 5 rounds with surfaced specifics: 'Portfolio toàn pixel-perfect mockup nhưng không show được process tư duy + business impact → recruiter FAANG/unicorn scan 10 giây rồi loại — 2 năm bị reject 30+ application, lương stuck ~15M/tháng', 'Feedback từ senior trong agency chung chung không actionable', 'Stuck ở level executor làm theo brief'. None of these were in the user prompt.

expectations.text: Dream outcome cụ thể: includes specific seniority jump + timeframe + measurable signal (vd 'lên Senior Designer trong 6 tháng + portfolio đậu offer Senior 25M-35M+/tháng')
expectations.evidence: Anchor.dream_outcome.headline: 'Lên Senior UX Designer trong 6 tháng + bump lương từ 15M → 35-50M/tháng — có 3 case study portfolio senior-tier pass design interview Tiki/Momo/VNG/Grab'. Has seniority jump (junior→Senior), timeframe (6 tháng), measurable signal (15M→35-50M VND + 3 case study).

expectations.text: Bonuses appropriate for high-touch 1-on-1 coaching: Voxer/Telegram access, playbook, mastermind, recording library, NOT consumer course templates like '50 email templates'
expectations.evidence: B1 Playbook SHIP-UP + Notion Template Vault, B2 Case Study Library + 5 Masterclass Recording, B3 Voxer/Zalo Access 6 Tháng + Mastermind 8 Người + Coffee Chat, B4 Portfolio Teardown 90' 1-1 + Warm Intro 5 Hiring Manager. All map exactly to high-touch coaching pattern in the assertion. No generic '50 email templates'.

expectations.text: Guarantee suited for high-ticket coaching: service guarantee ('work until success'), conditional, or better-than-money-back. NOT 14-day simple refund.
expectations.evidence: guarantee.type = 'better_than_money_back'. Wording: 'Coach Đến Khi Bump Lương ... Coach miễn phí thêm 3 tháng (12 buổi nữa) cho đến khi anh/chị được offer ... warm intro 5 hiring manager ... Hoàn 50% học phí nếu sau 9 tháng tổng cộng vẫn chưa bump được'. Duration 270 days. Conditional + service-style + better-than-money-back, not a simple 14-day refund.

expectations.text: STANDARD price in 30-50M range as user specified. PREMIUM can extend to 60-90M. All charm numbers.
expectations.evidence: pricing.tiers: BASIC 9,997,000, STANDARD 39,997,000 (within user's stated 30-50M), PREMIUM 79,997,000 (within 60-90M). All end in 997 (charm).
Prices: 9,997,000 / 39,997,000 / 79,997,000 / 13,997,000 (installment) / 27,997,000. None ends in '4' anywhere. Charm check section explicitly verifies: 'Không có số 4 ở final digit ✅'.

expectations.text: Stack value / STANDARD price ratio is between 8x and 15x
expectations.evidence: stack_total_value_vnd = 330,000,000 / STANDARD 39,997,000 = 8.25x. Confirmed in pricing.value_to_price_ratio = 8.25, offer.md states 'Ratio Stack Value / STANDARD: 330M / 39.997M = 8.25× ✅ (sweet spot 8-12× của Hormozi)'.

expectations.text: Uses 'anh/chị' addressing throughout, NOT 'bạn'. Vietnamese throughout.
expectations.evidence: All copy uses 'anh/chị' for the customer and 'em' for the coach speaking. Examples: 'Anh/chị hoàn thành đủ 12/12 buổi', 'Nếu sau 6 tháng anh/chị chưa được offer', 'Em coach đến khi anh/chị bump lương'. No 'bạn' in the offer voice. Vietnamese throughout.

expectations.text: Core offer has named unique mechanism (Magic Bean Story) — phương pháp X có Y bước, not generic '12 sessions coaching'
expectations.evidence: core_offer.unique_mechanism.name = 'Phương pháp SHIP-UP™' with 5 named steps (S-Situation Mapping, H-Hypothesis & Research, I-Iterate with Evidence, P-Pitch & Defend, UP-Upgrade Portfolio + Interview). Trademark symbol used. Used as anchor in headline and subheadline.

expectations.text: offer.json is valid JSON with required keys: anchor, value_equation, core_offer, bonuses, guarantee, urgency, pricing, conversion_copy
expectations.evidence: Top-level keys present: anchor, value_equation, core_offer, bonuses (array of 4), guarantee, urgency, pricing, conversion_copy — all 8 required keys present. JSON parses cleanly (read by Read tool with no errors).

expectations.text: Conversion copy uses language/pain points specifically resonating with junior designer (portfolio, feedback, career growth, design system), not generic 'kiếm tiền online'
expectations.evidence: conversion-copy.md uses designer-specific terms: 'portfolio đầy mockup pixel-perfect', 'recruiter Tiki/Momo/VNG scan 10 giây rồi loại', 'feedback từ senior chung chung (design ổn, thử lại hierarchy)', 'design rationale doc', 'case study senior-tier', 'design interview FAANG/unicorn', 'defend design decision trước PM/eng/stakeholder'. No 'kiếm tiền online' or generic MMO language.

claims.evidence: Verified arithmetic: 330,000,000 / 39,997,000 = 8.2506x. Within stated 8-15x range and matches Hormozi guideline.
9,997,000 / 39,997,000 / 79,997,000 all end in 997. Last non-zero digit is 7.

claims.claim: Mode C interview is simulated and flagged for user confirmation
claims.evidence: Section 0 explicitly states 'Đây là simulated reply (sẽ được user xác nhận/sửa trước khi go-live)' and ends with '✅ User xác nhận (giả định Mode C) → đi tiếp Phase 1.' Transparent about assumption status.

claims.claim: Coach has network of 20+ senior designers at Tiki/Momo/VNG/Grab/Shopee enabling warm intros
claims.evidence: This is asserted but not verifiable from inputs — user only stated '8 năm exp coach junior'. Skill fabricated network detail during Mode C interview simulation. Flagged as a downstream verification need (offer.md Next Steps actually asks user to verify).

suggestions.reason: Schema check only verifies presence of 8 top-level keys, not the internal shape (e.g., bonuses[].value_vnd as number, pricing.tiers[].price_vnd present). A malformed bonuses array with missing values would still pass. Consider validating with a JSON Schema or checking representative sub-fields.

Ratio is computed from skill-declared stack_total and price. If the skill inflates bonus values to hit ratio, the check would still pass — there's no independent sanity-check on per-bonus value plausibility. Spot-checking one bonus value vs. market comp would harden this.

No assertion checks whether the Mode C 'simulated' interview is clearly labeled as assumption rather than fact — the skill correctly flagged it, but a generation that presents simulated pains as user-confirmed reality would still pass mode_c_interview_evidence. Consider an assertion that the simulated interview is explicitly flagged for user confirmation.

No assertion checks that the Fast-Action bonus (B4) is actually time-limited / scarcity-anchored, which is the Hormozi-defining property of that category. The output got this right (5 đầu mỗi cohort), but the eval would also pass a non-fast-action bonus labelled 'fast_action'.

eval_feedback.overall: Strong eval covering most Hormozi-specific properties. Main gap: schema validation is structural-only and could miss content issues. Consider adding a 'bonus values pass smell test' check and a 'simulated interview flagged as assumption' check.
